overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The vehicle moves through dense urban streets filled with holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and occasional traffic while rain creates reflective wet surfaces on the roads.

events.description: turning right at intersection with crosswalk markings
passing pedestrians on sidewalk near neon storefronts
turning left onto main commercial road with heavy signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets, making turns at intersections while observing neon signage and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving in opposite direction through the rain
pedestrian walking on sidewalk under glowing neon signs

entered.detail: large pink neon advertisement covering building facade with Japanese characters
floating holographic display showing commercial content with blue glow
rain-soaked reflective street surface with puddles and neon reflections
tall cyberpunk building with illuminated windows and neon trim
futuristic traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk commercial district at night. The vehicle navigates turns at intersections marked with yellow crosswalk stripes, passing pedestrians and other vehicles while surrounded by towering buildings covered in pink neon billboards and holographic advertisements. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights, creating a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass leading to gas station

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath concrete overpass structure
passing large truck parked near gas station entrance
exiting underpass into open area with illuminated gas station

agents.ego_description: driving under an overpass with reduced lighting, then approaching a gas station area with industrial elements

notable_agents.action: large yellow truck parked on the roadside near industrial containers
car ahead entering the underpass with brake lights visible

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead creating sheltered area
illuminated gas station with futuristic pumps under bright white lights
red and blue industrial containers or barriers along the roadside
tall street lamp with greenish light illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the open neon-lit street into a semi-covered underpass beneath a massive concrete overpass, temporarily sheltering from the rain. The lighting shifts to a darker, mixed environment with industrial elements like colored containers and a gas station with bright canopy lights. The road continues wet and reflective as the car passes parked trucks and emerges back into the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and waiting vehicles
entering area with dense concentration of holographic billboards and neon signage

agents.ego_description: cruising down main commercial strip with heavy neon and holographic displays on all sides, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: black car driving ahead in same direction through the rain
pedestrian in white jacket walking on sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisement with pink neon glow displaying commercial content
tall vertical neon sign with Japanese-style characters in pink and blue
building covered with multiple digital screens and neon trim
yellow striped crosswalk markings on wet reflective road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide commercial avenue densely packed with holographic advertisements and vertical neon signs. The vehicle accelerates along the wet road, passing through intersections with crosswalks while surrounded by pedestrians and other traffic. Massive floating holograms and building-sized digital screens create an immersive cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with traffic control

events.description: turning right at intersection with overhead street sign
slowing to a stop at red traffic light behind other vehicles
accelerating from stop as light changes to green

agents.ego_description: navigating through multiple intersections, making turns and adjusting speed for traffic lights, eventually stopping at red light

notable_agents.action: dark vehicle ahead slowing and stopping for red traffic light
pedestrian in red clothing crossing the street at intersection

entered.detail: red overhead street sign with white text indicating street names
small shop with bright pink and blue neon trim around windows
skyscraper with illuminated windows visible in the distance
giant screen displaying animated advertisement with bright colors

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving through mixed commercial streets with traffic control elements. The vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection marked by overhead street signs, then slows to a stop at a red light behind other traffic. Large digital billboards and distant skyscrapers dominate the skyline as the car waits at the intersection before accelerating onward through the rain-slicked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from vibrant commercial districts through a dim industrial underpass and back into a sprawling neon avenue. It begins by navigating intersections marked with yellow crosswalks, where towering buildings draped in pink neon billboards and holographic advertisements reflect vividly off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle moves forward, the scene shifts into a semi-covered underpass beneath a massive concrete overpass, momentarily replacing the open rain with the industrial glow of a gas station canopy and colored containers. The camera then emerges from the shadows back into a wide commercial avenue, accelerating past massive floating holograms and building-sized digital screens that dominate the skyline. Finally, the vehicle makes a right turn through the rain-slicked streets and slows to a stop at a red light behind other traffic, framed by distant skyscrapers and overhead street signs before accelerating onward.
